description:
List of debtors. Names on recto: Sulaymān b. ʿIwāḍ; Abū l-Khayr; Abū l-Riḍā.

Verso and a few lines on recto are in Arabic script. A dīwān (al-jaysh?) is mentioned in the Arabic-script section on the recto and, perhaps, a ṣarrāf in the first line of the verso.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
